articles.title: Europa's Ocean May Contain Building Blocks of Life
articles.summary: New research suggests that Jupiter's moon Europa, and potentially other Jovian moons, may have formed with their own supply of life's essential building blocks, boosting prospects for the habitability of Europa's subsurface ocean.

articles.title: JUICE Spacecraft Captures Interstellar Comet
articles.summary: The European Space Agency's JUICE mission successfully captured detailed images of interstellar comet 3I/ATLAS, revealing a glowing coma and tail as it passed through our solar system.

articles.title: Chandra Observatory Translates Gas Giants into Audio
articles.summary: NASA's Chandra X-ray Observatory has released new 'sonifications'—audio translations of visual data—allowing audiences to literally hear the atmospheric dynamics of Jupiter, Saturn, and Uranus.

articles.title: SpaceX Launches 54 Starlink Satellites on Falcon 9
articles.summary: A SpaceX Falcon 9 rocket successfully launched 54 Starlink satellites into low Earth orbit from Vandenberg Space Force Base, continuing the rapid expansion of the orbital constellation.
